visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic animation showing an anime-style school building surrounded by cherry blossoms. Large white Traditional Chinese text overlays appear in the center. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor setting, likely a bedroom, where three plush dolls are positioned on a bed. One is a blue demon-like figure with yellow eyes, and the other two are small beige figures with expressive eyes. A whiteboard behind them says 'Student Dormitory'. (3) A new plush doll with messy black hair, a red shirt, and a blue jacket enters the frame. The camera uses close-ups to show the interactions between the new doll and the blue demon doll. (4) The new doll performs a comedic action where its clothes are removed, revealing its plain plush body underneath. This is followed by a close-up of a 'Student ID' card featuring the doll's character. (5) The final sequence is a product showcase against a clean, animated background. The doll is shown rotating and alongside its packaging and accessories. Text overlays provide pricing and promotional details.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 阿啾小劇場. [Subtitle]: 新人大騷動? 轉學生登場!. (2) [Slogan]: 阿啾小劇場. [Subtitle]: 聽說今天有個轉學生要來叛逆. (3) [Subtitle]: 一定是個好人 天真天真. (4) [Subtitle]: 我怕他不好相處 怕怕. (5) [Subtitle]: 不管是誰都還是要聽老大的話啦. (6) [Subtitle]: 哼 沒錯 我要讓他知道誰才是老大 叛逆叛逆. (7) [Subtitle]: 大家好. (8) [Subtitle]: 喔? 你就是那個新來的啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 你們好呀. (10) [Subtitle]: 給我走開你擋到我了. (11) [Subtitle]: 哼 看著不怎麼樣嘛 自我介紹一下吧 叛逆. (12) [Subtitle]: 喔 大家好 我是由阿啾小劇場裡的學長 Vtype Shawn學長的型態衍生出的絨毛娃娃周邊. (13) [Subtitle]: 太多沒必要的細節了!. (14) [Subtitle]: 我身高總共20公分 體重約82克. (15) [Subtitle]: 哇好高喔 我才7公分而已. (16) [Subtitle]: 我說身高. (17) [Subtitle]: 哼 那你有什麼才藝嗎 叛逆. (18) [Subtitle]: 有的 哎唷來 讓我們看看. (19) [Subtitle]: 我的才藝是可以一秒穿脫衣服. (20) [Subtitle]: 他沒有那個耶?. (21) [Subtitle]: 很好 身材不錯 頭髮也很多 眼睛也很可愛 看起來也很有禮貌 就讓你加入我們的學生宿舍吧 你之後就是我的小弟四號 叛逆. (22) [Subtitle]: 喔 那我先給你這個. (23) [Subtitle]: 什麼! 他有學生證!!. (24) [Subtitle]: 那個是學生會長專屬的學生證. (25) [Subtitle]: 他從哪邊掏出來的!?. (26) [Subtitle]: 只有可能是那裡了吧. (27) [Subtitle]: 我今天就是要來治理這個 腐敗已久的學生宿舍 賭上我的學生會長之名 叛逆仙子 你明天就去訓導處報到!. (28) [Subtitle]: 你要不要先把衣服穿上?. (29) [Subtitle]: 喔好. (30) [Slogan]: Shawn學長 生日紀念絨毛娃娃 20公分絨毛娃娃. (31) [Slogan]: Shawn學長 售價NT$800 陪伴在大家身邊 附學生證 (替身).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: The video features 4 primary plush characters but no real human beings.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Multiple plush dolls including a blue demon-like doll and a human-like doll with black hair and a blue jacket named Shawn.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic bedroom environment with a sofa or bed, and stylized animated backgrounds for the intro and product showcase.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic, high-tempo jingle featuring synthesized instruments and a male vocal singing the brand name 'Achū Little Theater'. A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks the transition to the dialogue. (2) The scene features multiple high-pitched, exaggerated male voices acting as plush characters. The blue demon voice is commanding and raspy, while the Shawn doll voice is clearer and more matter-of-fact. (3) Frequent cartoon sound effects like 'dings', pops, and comedic impacts punctuate the dialogue to emphasize jokes. The background music remains light and bouncy, typical of variety show skits. (4) A sudden musical shift occurs when the student ID is revealed, using a more dramatic or sparkly synthesizer sound to mark the climax. (5) The video concludes with a medium-tempo, upbeat pop track as the narrator details the product information with a clear, professional yet friendly tone.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Comedic Roleplay -> Product Reveal -> Commercial Details
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'Shawn Senior Birthday Memorial Plush Doll' by integrating it into a humorous skit with existing popular characters from the 'Achū Little Theater' universe.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of product features, pricing, and promotional details at the end of the video.
endorsementObject: Shawn 學長 絨毛娃娃

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video successfully blends community-driven storytelling (skits) with commercial product placement. The fast editing and high-arousal audio are characteristic of successful short-form social media content.
